results.title: Indian bowler Gurnoor Brar found guilty of breaching ICC Code of Conduct
results.description: India bowler Gurnoor Brar has been given a warning for breaching level one of the ICC Code of Conduct during the first ODI against England in Birmingham on July 14, 2026. Brar was found to have breached Article 2.9 of the ICC Code of Conduct for Players and Player Support Personnel, which relates to “throwing [...]
